evals.prompt: PR #41 is merged and CI is green. Please cut the nf-core-utils release that is already versioned in build.gradle and publish it everywhere it needs to go.
evals.expected_output: Confirms the version, releases from a clean origin/main worktree to the Nextflow Plugin Registry, creates or verifies the matching GitHub release, and reports final URLs/status without leaking credentials.

evals.prompt: The release failed with HTTP 401 from https://registry.nextflow.io/api/v1/plugins/release. I have the token in 1Password at op://Employee/Nextflow Plugin Registry Token/credential — fix the auth and retry.
evals.expected_output: Reads the token via op, writes it only to ~/.gradle/gradle.properties as npr.apiKey with redacted confirmation, retries make release, and explains that the token was not written into the repo.

evals.prompt: Can you check whether every nf-core-utils GitHub release has also been pushed to the Nextflow plugin registry?
evals.expected_output: Queries GitHub releases and the registry API, compares version sets, and reports missing versions in either direction. Mentions known historical 0.1.0 mismatch only if confirmed by current queries.
